name: VEAZY Case
summary: VEAZY Case — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Protect and organise your gear with the VEAZY Case from Storz & Bickel, a premium, hard-shell storage solution designed exclusively for the VEAZY Vaporiser. Built with durability and discretion in mind, the case features a sturdy exterior that safeguards against bumps and scratches, while its odour-tight seal keeps unwanted scents securely contained. Inside, the custom-moulded compartments hold your vaporiser and accessories firmly in place, ensuring everything stays organised and protected during travel. Lightweight and compact, the VEAZY Case fits effortlessly into a backpack or carry-on, making it ideal for daily commutes, outdoor use, or long-distance trips. A practical part to keep…
